subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned unto the Most Exalted Horizon and believed in God, the Peerless, the All-Informed—a Speaking Book and Command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الافق الاعلی و آمن بالله الفرد الخبیر کتاب ناطق و امر
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat], @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
